item.title: Marine Corps Journey and Service Story
item.description: A personal account of Marine Corps service and military journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the challenges and dedication of military life.

media:content.media:title: Marine Corps Journey and Service Story
media:content.media:description: A personal account of Marine Corps service and military journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the challenges and dedication of military life.

item.title: Marines at Peleliu: Battle Story
item.description: A historical account of Marines during the Battle of Peleliu. Focus on combat conditions, sacrifice, and the challenges faced during one of WWII’s intense Pacific battles.

media:content.media:title: Marines at Peleliu: Battle Story
media:content.media:description: A historical account of Marines during the Battle of Peleliu. Focus on combat conditions, sacrifice, and the challenges faced during one of WWII’s intense Pacific battles.

item.title: Flight 93: Heroism on 9/11
item.description: A powerful account of Flight 93 during 9/11. Focus on passenger heroism, the hijacking event, and the courageous actions that helped prevent a greater tragedy.

media:content.media:title: Flight 93: Heroism on 9/11
media:content.media:description: A powerful account of Flight 93 during 9/11. Focus on passenger heroism, the hijacking event, and the courageous actions that helped prevent a greater tragedy.

item.title: Military Pilot UFO Encounter Story
item.description: A pilot shares a firsthand account of an unidentified aerial encounter during military service. Focus on observation, flight experience, and unexplained aerial phenomena.

media:content.media:title: Military Pilot UFO Encounter Story
media:content.media:description: A pilot shares a firsthand account of an unidentified aerial encounter during military service. Focus on observation, flight experience, and unexplained aerial phenomena.

item.title: WWII Veteran Reflects on Pacific Combat
item.description: A veteran shares memories of fighting in the Pacific during WWII. Focus on combat conditions, personal experience, and the lasting impact of war service.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Reflects on Pacific Combat
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares memories of fighting in the Pacific during WWII. Focus on combat conditions, personal experience, and the lasting impact of war service.

item.title: D-Day's First Wave: Survivor Story
item.description: Hear a D-Day survivor recount the first wave of the Normandy invasion, sharing personal experiences, challenges faced, and the bravery shown on that historic day.

media:content.media:title: D-Day's First Wave: Survivor Story
media:content.media:description: Hear a D-Day survivor recount the first wave of the Normandy invasion, sharing personal experiences, challenges faced, and the bravery shown on that historic day.

item.title: Cigarettes at Night in WWII
item.description: Explore stories of soldiers in WWII and their experiences with cigarettes at night, highlighting daily life, camaraderie, and unique moments from the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: Cigarettes at Night in WWII
media:content.media:description: Explore stories of soldiers in WWII and their experiences with cigarettes at night, highlighting daily life, camaraderie, and unique moments from the battlefield.

item.title: A Wartime Story
item.description: Hear a compelling wartime story from WWII, highlighting personal experiences, challenges, and the courage displayed by soldiers during conflict.

media:content.media:title: A Wartime Story
media:content.media:description: Hear a compelling wartime story from WWII, highlighting personal experiences, challenges, and the courage displayed by soldiers during conflict.

item.title: WWII Veterans Recall the Battle of the Bulge
item.description: WWII veterans share memories of the harsh winter during the Battle of the Bulge, recounting survival, camaraderie, and the extreme conditions they endured.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veterans Recall the Battle of the Bulge
media:content.media:description: WWII veterans share memories of the harsh winter during the Battle of the Bulge, recounting survival, camaraderie, and the extreme conditions they endured.
